name: Peach Melba Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Sift the first four ingredients together.
Stir in the egg, butter, and milk until just moistened.
Fill paper-lined muffin tins about half full.
Cover with fruit, then remaining batter.
Mix the sugar, flour, and butter together until crumbly.
Sprinkle over your muffins, and bake for approximately 20 minutes.
